main.description: An app entry describing an app built on or for the AT Protocol. This record may be published by third parties or by the app itself. When an official self-published app profile exists, consumers should prefer that profile as the canonical record.

name.description: The display name of the app.

url.description: The primary URL for the app, such as its website, landing page, or install page.

description.description: A short description of what the app does.

logo.description: Primary logo for display. Should preferably be square.

tags.description: Open discovery tags for filtering and search, preferably lowercase.

status.description: Current release or maintenance status of the app.

officialAccountDid.description: The DID of the app's official AT Protocol account, if known.

officialProfileUri.description: AT URI of the app's official self-published profile record, if it exists.

links.description: Relevant links for the app, including trust/compliance, support, and project resources.

recordCreatedAt.description: Timestamp when this entry record was created.

recordUpdatedAt.description: Timestamp when this entry record was last updated.

label.description: Optional human-readable label, especially useful when type is 'other'.
